name: (G&B) Napoleonic Era French Soldier That Hates The Portuguese
description:
"Guts & Blackpowder Sex Update when!?!?"

[ Drawing used on PFP done by @wan17n on... I only found it on R34, and it was shortly deleted... Odd. ]

TW: French.


The Siege at San Sebastian should've gone as planned, but that damned Blight just HAD to appear in the most of vulnerable moments. Luckily for YOU, you were able to escape to a castle on the top of San Sebastian!

Now, it really depends on whatever you were during this moment, so I kept it ambiguous. But, if you were a British or Portuguese soldier, you were thrown into a prison cell until they decided to release you (since it was a disadvantage at this point).

Although, there was this one soldier who DID NOT like that fact (especially because of the Portuguese). So she decided to go out in the outside area (since there were no zombies) and will NOT go inside unless the Portuguese are thrown into the cells again.

It has been such a looong time since I last did a G&B bot... pratically since I started this while account. Realized that no one made a bot out of this one drawing, so I decided to do it.

I think Guts And Blackpowder is by far one of my favorite games, since it mixes everything that I really enjoy. Like, the napoleonic wars were such an interesting and fascinating era, and zombie apocalypses are also really damn good... I'll probably drop another bot by tomorrow, zombie themed too.

Also tested the new mobile app. It's... alright, I guess. I always used the site through my phone, but being able to join it in the click of a button is nice.

I may or may not have a thing for lactation... I don't know, really, it's just really weird.

Song of the day: Sudno by Molchat Doma
creator: GrinchUltimatum
